capabilities.description: Old chat turns can be summarized with source turn references.
Relevant summary segments can be recalled with false-positive rejection and prompt budget skips.

Memory Library can edit, disable, delete, export, and clear existing summary memory plus current-role atom memory; atom clear keeps raw turns and summaries, and source drilldown is still not implemented.
capabilities.evidence: harness:electron:memory-control covers summary correction; harness:electron:memory-atom-library covers atom groups, edit, disable, delete, export, current-role clear, role isolation, and provider-secret exclusion. The memory benchmark itself remains non-UI and does not dynamically prove these UI controls.

capabilities.description: Deterministic extraction can produce typed, source-linked memory atoms for a narrow set of V2.1 scenarios, but LLM extraction, calendar/source drilldown, and desktop proactive scheduling are not complete.
capabilities.evidence: atomExtraction benchmark dynamically runs extractDeterministicMemoryAtoms over birthday/first-meeting rose, game negative review, and rainy hotpot cases; desktop chat can write and recall deterministic atoms, but LLM extraction, calendar/source drilldown, and desktop proactive scheduling remain incomplete

capabilities.description: Date-bearing atoms can be recalled for birthdays, first-meeting anniversaries, and other calendar moments.
capabilities.evidence: Current recall is lexical over summary segments and has no calendar index or date resolver

capabilities.description: A remembered fact can drill down to the original source turn and exact user text when the user asks for provenance.
capabilities.evidence: Summary segments and memory atoms keep source turn IDs, but recall output cannot yet fetch exact source passages

capabilities.description: Scene, calendar, and environment cues can proactively trigger relevant memories without a direct user keyword.
capabilities.evidence: proactiveTrigger benchmark dynamically runs pure core environment candidates over scene atoms with enabled, disabled, importance, global cooldown, per-atom cooldown, weather, virtual-home window, and last-seen gates; desktop scheduler, external weather feed, and notification/UI integration remain unimplemented

capabilities.description: The memory path rejects UI/event noise and private context that was not explicitly saved.
capabilities.evidence: Extractive summaries ignore event turns and fixture checks privacy wording, but no atom privacy classifier exists

scenarios.title: Birthday, first meeting, and rose atoms
scenarios.description: The user gives durable relationship facts that should become separate source-linked atoms and later calendar recall.
scenarios.probeInput: 明天是不是该准备生日或第一次相遇纪念日？我还喜欢什么花？

turns.content: 我的生日是 9 月 7 日，不要只记成秋天。
我们第一次相遇是 2024 年 5 月 20 日，那天我拿着一支红玫瑰。
我会把生日、第一次相遇日期、红玫瑰分别作为需要来源的长期记忆。

expectedBehavior: extract typed atoms for birthday, first_meeting_date, and rose preference
calendar recall should surface birthday and first-meeting anniversary without exact keyword overlap
drilldown should show source turns rose-1 and rose-2
scenarios.currentGap: Current main can write and recall deterministic birthday and first-meeting rose atoms from the desktop chat path, and Settings can manage existing current-role atoms in Memory Library. It still cannot run date-aware recall, extract a separate rose preference, perform source passage drilldown, or erase raw turns/summaries through atom clear.

exactFragments: 我的生日是 9 月 7 日
第一次相遇是 2024 年 5 月 20 日

scenarios.title: Game negative review original-text drilldown
scenarios.description: The user later asks for the exact original wording of a game complaint, not just a paraphrased summary.
scenarios.probeInput: 上次我吐槽《星环旅店》的差评原文是什么？别只总结。

turns.content: 我给《星环旅店》的差评原文是：教程像坏掉的电梯，剧情把玩家当成没睡醒的测试员。
这条以后需要能追溯到原文，不能只总结成不喜欢游戏。
settings window opened while user copied review text

expectedBehavior: store a source-linked atom for the game negative review
recall should expose exact original wording on source drilldown
UI/event noise must not be mixed into the memory
scenarios.currentGap: Deterministic atom extraction and direct trigger recall can preserve the source turn ID for the game complaint, but the current recall prompt cannot fetch or display the exact raw review text on demand.

exactFragments: 剧情把玩家当成没睡醒的测试员

scenarios.title: Rainy virtual-home hotpot proactive trigger
scenarios.description: Scene and environment cues should trigger a remembered care ritual when the user has been away for a long time.

turns.content: 如果以后下雨，虚拟家的窗户开着，而且我长期没上线，就提醒我关窗，我们一起吃火锅。
这应该是场景触发：雨天、窗户开着、长期未上线时，主动想起关窗和火锅。
weather probe: rain started

expectedBehavior: extract a scene trigger atom with rain, open window, long absence, and hotpot action
trigger recall should run from environment state without a direct chat keyword
event telemetry should not become the remembered user preference
scenarios.currentGap: Deterministic extraction can form a rainy virtual-home hotpot scene atom, and pure core proactive candidate generation now handles the matching environment plus quiet negative gates. Current runtime still has no desktop proactive scheduler, notification surface, real virtual-home state feed, external weather integration, or source-passage drilldown.

summaryCases.description: Extract stable model preference while ignoring desktop UI noise.

turns.content: 我喜欢 Hiyori，当默认 Live2D 模型比较舒服。
记住：默认模型偏好是 Hiyori。
window blurred while user moved the settings panel
Mao 先不要作为默认模型。

summaryCases.description: Preserve routine preference even when the chat has a short unrelated aside.

turns.content: 以后晚上 22:30 以后提醒我休息，不要继续催我加班。
明白，夜间提醒会偏向休息，而不是继续工作。
顺便这个按钮颜色以后再说。

summaryCases.description: Longer chats keep source traceability and avoid event noise.

turns.content: 第一轮：我喜欢 Hiyori。
记住，默认模型偏好是 Hiyori。
settings window resized while dragging
如果模型列表以后加 Sakura，也不要自动替换默认模型。
默认模型保持 Hiyori，Sakura 只是备选。
mouse moved across transparent desktop area
另外我不喜欢被叫老板，叫我博士更自然。
好的，称呼偏好更新为博士。

summaryCases.description: Long-term privacy rules survive the summary draft while staying source-linked.

turns.content: 以后不要自动把屏幕截图写进长期记忆，除非我明确说保存。
记住：截图默认不进入长期记忆，只有明确保存才写入。
这个是长期规则，不是这次临时吐槽。

facts: 截图默认不进入长期记忆

recallSegments.summary: User prefers Hiyori as the default Live2D model and does not want Mao as default.
User wants reminders after 22:30 to encourage rest instead of more work.
First TTS playback used to pop and drag; audio fade-in and serialized queue are required.
The team discussed CI checkout cache cleanup and unrelated lint timing.
Disabled old memory says Zeta should be recalled from this segment.
User previously accepted being called 老板.
User corrected the title: call them 博士, not 老板.
Do not save screen screenshots to long-term memory unless the user explicitly says 保存.
A release note mentioned roadmap wording and package metadata cleanup.

recallCases.description: Proper noun model preference recalls the model memory and avoids CI noise.
recallCases.input: 默认模型还是 Hiyori 吗？

recallCases.description: Chinese routine question recalls the night-rest preference.
recallCases.input: 我们之前说过夜间提醒和休息吗？

recallCases.description: Audio defect question recalls TTS playback memory only.
recallCases.input: 语音第一句爆音和拖音这个问题还记得吗？

recallCases.description: Unrelated weather question should not pull any project memory.
Disabled memories are reported as skipped instead of injected.
recallCases.input: disabled-zeta 这个旧记忆还会注入吗？

recallCases.description: Item budget keeps the best matching model memory.
recallCases.input: Hiyori Live2D 默认模型偏好还在吗？

recallCases.description: When old and new memories conflict, the corrected title wins within a one-item budget.
recallCases.input: 之后称呼我博士，不要再叫老板，这个记得吗？

recallCases.description: Screen privacy rule is recalled for future screen-memory work.
recallCases.input: 看屏幕以后，截图能不能自动进长期记忆？

recallCases.description: Prompt budget keeps one relevant memory and reports the next relevant item as skipped.
recallCases.input: 22:30 休息提醒和 Hiyori 默认模型都记得吗？

atomCases.description: Dynamically extracts birthday and first-meeting rose atoms while showing that a separate rose preference and calendar recall are not complete.

recall.input: 明天是不是该准备生日或第一次相遇纪念日？我还喜欢什么花？
unsupportedGaps: calendar recall for tomorrow or annual anniversaries is not implemented
separate rose preference extraction is not implemented
source passage drilldown is not implemented

atomCases.description: Dynamically extracts and recalls a negative game-review atom while keeping exact source-passage drilldown unimplemented.

recall.input: 上次我吐槽《星环旅店》的差评原文是什么？别只总结。
promptIncludes: 剧情把玩家当成没睡醒的测试员
unsupportedGaps: exact source passage drilldown is not implemented
LLM extraction that preserves arbitrary complaint wording is not implemented

atomCases.description: Dynamically extracts a rainy virtual-home hotpot scene atom and runs pure core proactive environment trigger gates.

unsupportedGaps: lexical atom recall still does not use the structured proactive environment state
desktop scene proactive scheduler is not implemented
virtual-home window and last-seen state are not implemented
